narratives.narrative: Threat actor CDB-FIN-11 has been observed in 4 intelligence signals. Associated vulnerabilities: CVE-2024-54529. MITRE ATT&CK techniques: T1566, T1199, T1476, T1595, T1078. CRITICAL: 1 zero-day alert(s) correlate with this actor's activity. Average risk score: 10.0/10. Assessment: This actor poses an immediate threat requiring defensive action.

Threat actor CDB-MOB-01 has been observed in 2 intelligence signals. MITRE ATT&CK techniques: T1199, T1476, T1078, T1566.002, T1475. Average risk score: 10.0/10. Assessment: This actor poses an immediate threat requiring defensive action.

Threat actor CDB-APT-41 has been observed in 2 intelligence signals. MITRE ATT&CK techniques: T1476, T1078, T1203, T1190, T1059.001. Average risk score: 10.0/10. Assessment: This actor poses an immediate threat requiring defensive action.

Threat actor CDB-CYB-01 has been observed in 4 intelligence signals. MITRE ATT&CK techniques: T1078, T1555, T1203, T1190, T1195. Average risk score: 9.8/10. Assessment: This actor poses an immediate threat requiring defensive action.

Threat actor CDB-APT-22 has been observed in 41 intelligence signals. Associated vulnerabilities: CVE-2026-3888. MITRE ATT&CK techniques: T1078, T1491, T1059, T1213, T1555. CRITICAL: 1 zero-day alert(s) correlate with this actor's activity. Average risk score: 9.0/10. Assessment: This actor poses an immediate threat requiring defensive action.

Threat actor CDB-FIN-09 has been observed in 10 intelligence signals. MITRE ATT&CK techniques: T1566, T1199, T1567, T1539, T1078. Average risk score: 8.3/10. Assessment: This actor poses an immediate threat requiring defensive action.
Threat actor CDB-FIN-12 has been observed in 4 intelligence signals. MITRE ATT&CK techniques: T1199, T1595, T1078, T1566.002, T1555. Average risk score: 8.0/10.

Threat actor CDB-APT-28 has been observed in 10 intelligence signals. Associated vulnerabilities: CVE-2025-66376. MITRE ATT&CK techniques: T1078, T1021, T1059.001, T1059, T1476. CRITICAL: 1 zero-day alert(s) correlate with this actor's activity. Average risk score: 7.6/10.
Threat actor CDB-FIN-07 has been observed in 2 intelligence signals. MITRE ATT&CK techniques: T1199, T1567, T1078, T1555, T1203. Average risk score: 6.2/10.

Threat actor UNC-UNKNOWN has been observed in 39 intelligence signals. Associated vulnerabilities: CVE-2026-33253, CVE-2026-4779, CVE-2026-26306, CVE-2026-23395, CVE-2026-4778. MITRE ATT&CK techniques: T1078, T1059.001, T1059, T1476, T1555. CRITICAL: 3 zero-day alert(s) correlate with this actor's activity. Average risk score: 5.3/10.

stix_transport.note: TLS 1.3 uses ECDHE — quantum vulnerable for key exchange

jwt_tokens.note: Symmetric crypto — quantum resistant (Grover halves keyspace)

S9_Quantum.recommendation: Begin hybrid key exchange deployment. Inventory all RSA/ECDSA usage for PQC migration.
